notes: Homophone pair. Probability quoted (6.8%) is for ALL THREE fire/light pairings (10/11, 16/17, 82/83) being incidental.
Indirect: 17 has 'eyes' as metaphor for 'light' (Matt 6:22-23). Same p-value note as 10/11.
'light' appears twice in 83.1. Same p-value note as 10/11.
'wealth' (ʿetar) occurs only twice in collection; both times next to 'place' (ʾatar). p=3.8% for that co-occurrence.
Second occurrence of the wealth/place pairing.
'women' (nesse) is in only 3 logia (15, 46.1, 114.1); each falls next to a logion containing 'someone' (naš). p=0.0085% across all 3 pairs.
Shared root play. Perrin argues 'and walk about the districts' was added by editor specifically to repeat panni's syllables in the next logion.
'hand' in emphatic state is identical to verb 'to know'. Editor added 'what no hand has touched' to forge bridge between 16 (which has 'know') and 18 (which also has 'know').
Continuation of the 16/17/18 know/hand chain. 18.3: 'will know the end'.
